title: Cleanse and prepare for dream logic
content:
Cleanse and prepare for dream logic
🔁 [EE01] CYCLE LOGIC
Align → Respond → Build → Share → Reflect → Reset
• Start in quiet to prime your emotional wave.
• Respond mid-morning to life/data/AI inputs.
• Iterate midday, treat friction as feedback.
• Peak creatively around 3–6PM, birth-time resonance.
• Evening is integration, output tagging, emotional digestion.
🧰 [FF01] TOOLS + IMPLEMENTATION
✳️ Core Uses
System
Use
NotionBlock toggle templates for each time slot
Google CalendarRecurring rhythm overlays
AI Prompt KitLoad blocks into prompt starters
Legacy Mythos SystemDesign archetypes/characters that match 3/2 MG waveform
🧪 [GG01] JOURNAL TRACKERS
Track 1–5 rating for:
• Energy
• Emotional clarity
• Focus
• Output
• "Aligned or Off" check-in
End-of-day question:What did my wave teach me today? What phase was I truly in?🧙 [HH01] MAGIC RITUALS (Optional Add-ons)
Block ID
Ritual
